title: Director of 'District 9' Unveils First AI Short Film, ByteDance Seedance 2.0 Powers Sci-Fi Epic
excerpt: Niels Bloemkamp, the renowned director who once amazed the world with his sci-fi masterpiece "District 9," has recently officially released his first AI micro-f
content_html:
Niels Bloemkamp, the renowned director who once amazed the world with his sci-fi masterpiece "District 9," has recently officially released his first AI micro-film, "Yin Bing." This approximately 13-minute sci-fi short film was entirely generated by ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 large model.

During the production process, Bloemkamp completed the entire film creation by guiding frame by frame through text prompts. It is worth noting that the film only obtained the appearance and voice authorization of 32 real actors, and professional concept designers participated in the assistance.

Exploring the Mysterious Plot and Opening a New Era for AI Feature Films

This short film continues the director's usual style of hard sci-fi and documentary, telling the story of a helicopter pilot who is drawn into a secret super-soldier program by the military. The entire film quickly attracted widespread attention from the global film and technology industries due to its tight visual rhythm and realistic texture.

Bloemkamp revealed on social media that he is currently planning to shoot a feature-length sci-fi film using the same method. For this purpose, he has established a new AI film studio, trying to gradually replace the complex production processes of traditional films.

content_html_zh:
曾凭借科幻巨作《第九区》震惊世界的著名导演尼尔斯·布洛姆坎普近日正式发布了他的首部人工智能微电影《银冰》。 这部约13分钟的科幻短片完全由字节跳动的Seedance 2.0大模型生成。

在制作过程中，布隆坎普通过文字提示逐帧引导，完成了整个影片创作。 值得注意的是，该片仅获得了32名真人演员的外观和配音授权，并有专业概念设计师参与协助。

探索神秘剧情，开启AI故事片新时代

这部短片延续了导演一贯的硬科幻和纪录片风格，讲述了一名直升机飞行员被军方拉入秘密超级士兵计划的故事。 整部电影因其紧凑的视觉节奏和逼真的质感，迅速引起了全球电影和科技行业的广泛关注。

布隆坎普在社交媒体上透露，他目前正计划用同样的方法拍摄一部长篇科幻电影。 为此，他成立了新的AI电影工作室，试图逐步取代传统电影复杂的制作流程。
